name: MEXCO ENERGY CORP
summary: Mexco Energy Corporation is an independent oil and gas company incorporated in Colorado in 1972, engaged in acquisition, exploration, development, and production of crude oil, natural gas, condensate, and NGLs in the United States. Operations are primarily in West Texas and Southeastern New Mexico, with properties in 14 states. All oil and gas interests are operated by third parties. Total proved reserves at March 31, 2025 were approximately 1.401 MMBOE.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Production and sale of crude oil from properties primarily in West Texas and Southeastern New Mexico.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and sale of natural gas, including condensate and NGLs, from properties across 14 states.

products.name: Royalty and Mineral Interests
products.description: Acquisition and holding of royalty, overriding royalty, and mineral interests in oil and gas properties.
